DARV.talk.NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILLE: Your mount exudes a rather unpleasant, parched aura. State your business, merchant — what chips do you intend to trade?
Hehe, honored guest! Take a look at these antiques — absolutely worth every penny!
Damp and distinguished, we meet again! The moment this one catches a whiff of rich moisture, it knows it's you.
Come see what I've just scavenged! I guarantee there's something rare enough to catch your eye this time!

Its nose remains as sharp as ever. I can only hope your wares today possess equal value.
[i][font_size=22]Neuvillette inclines his head slightly, quietly surveying the scattered objects.[/font_size][/i]
Haha, satisfaction guaranteed! These are top-notch goods — pick one!
NEOW.talk.NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILLE: There is no need to intervene, vast creature. The tides of Hydro shall reshape my form on their own.
[sine]...Honored one... ..Lord of the Primordial Sea..... ...Your... great authority... oppresses... ..my... breath.....[/sine]

[sine]...Once more... I welcome you... 
..Honored... Sovereign of Waters......[/sine]
I thank you for your kindness and gift. Should there truly be injustices ahead that defy righteousness, I shall carry out my duty of judgment.

[sine]...Go forth... 
...Let the pure... torrents... drown... all wickedness......[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEU:
My lady, you are wreathed in the moist breath of the deep sea.
Might I ask what business prompts you to halt my steps?
What a captivating, noble bearing! Do take these dazzling jewels and fine garments — they suit your elegance perfectly.
Ah, my noble sir, we meet again amidst the damp ocean currents.
Come see the treasures I've newly discovered. Only your grace is worthy of their radiance.
Your generosity is as moving as pure spring water. But fine garments and rare ornaments... to me, mere decency suffices.
Hehe, you are far too modest. Go on, pick one — let this spire bear witness to your peerless elegance!
OROBAS.talk.NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVIL: What a remarkable life form. Your gaze holds no impurity — only pure curiosity, as clear as a pristine spring.
Water! So much water! From the sea!? Tell me stories about the sea!!
Friend from the water! We meet again!! I didn't hear enough stories last time! I want more!!
Tell me, tell me! Amazing adventures! I've prepared lots of shiny things to trade!!
Since you are so eager, I shall tell you a tale of a Melusine and her paintbrush — as pure and earnest as morning dew.
Wow!! Melusines are so cute! That was amazing!! All these shinies are yours!!
PAEL.talk.NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILLE: We share the dragon's bloodline, yet your body is like melting snow. May these pure waters bring you a moment of solace.
[thinky_dots]The touch of flowing water... brings comfort. Take this flesh of mine, friend...[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]Welcome back, friend... That reassuring strength of yours... reminds me of my father...[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]Since you possess such mighty power... if you encounter him ahead, could you lend him a hand?[/thinky_dots]
I shall uncover the truth of the road ahead. If there is indeed bias that must be corrected, I will judge it fairly.
[thinky_dots]Thank you... Take this piece of flesh. I shall wait in dreamless slumber... to be reborn anew...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILLE: Your being is filled with a frenzied aura. I have no intention of stirring up needless conflict while climbing this spire.
[b]What incredible presence! You're definitely a true warrior! Take this weapon and fight me right now!!![/b]
[b]You dared refuse a fight last time! I won't let you escape this time!![/b]
[b]Show me your real power! Let's have a proper fight!!![/b]

Since pure words cannot calm your agitation, I shall subdue you with absolute force.
[i][font_size=22]Neuvillette effortlessly subdued Tanx.[/font_size][/i]
[b]So strong! I accept my defeat! This weapon is yours — we fight again next time!!![/b]
TEZCATARA.talk.NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEU:
On this long journey, the flame beside you carries a comforting warmth.
My greetings, madam.
Oh my, what a powerful yet weary soul! Come closer, dear, let Tezcatara [jitter][b]warm[/b][/jitter] you.
Little one with the scent of water, welcome back! Sit down and rest your feet.
Tezcatara just made some [jitter][b]snacks[/b][/jitter]. Come keep me company and have a bite — don't keep yourself so tense all the time.
I appreciate the kindness, but I usually require only pure water...
Don't worry, dear — I prepared a special recipe brimming with fruit juice, not dry at all. Come, have a taste!
VAKUU.talk.NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER_NEUVILL: Your words are laced with deceit and murky malice. If you continue to lure the innocent into the abyss, I shall deliver judgment upon you myself.
Hehe... What a terrifying sense of justice. For but a small price, you could possess my power and carry out a far more thorough judgment.
We meet again. The gears of justice turn so slowly — why not sign this simple contract and make everything as you wish in an instant?
Just hand over a tiny, insignificant sliver of authority... It's quite a bargain, wouldn't you say?
A laughable contract. I refuse to sign this scrap of paper.
Tch... So you saw right through it. Very well, let's do things the ordinary way. Is this "normal" enough for you?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NEUVILLETTE_CHARACTER: Your deeds have strayed grievously from justice, self-styled arbiter of "rules."
Before I pronounce sentence, I grant you the chance to defend yourself against the accusations of this spire.
Leave, judge. The affairs of this place are no concern of yours.
Justice must ensure the wicked are punished and the righteous rewarded.
Then let me, the "wicked one," send you back to the bottom of the spire.
If there is injustice in this matter, I shall judge it fairly.
Great as you are, there is no need for you to intervene.
